$comment: The schema-coverage manifest envelope (Harness Contracts v2; docs/harness-contracts-v2.md). Source of truth for which apodictic.*.schema.json artifact schemas exist, which validate.sh arm(s) bind each, which canonical file --check-all exercises it against, and which are closed-key. `bindings` holds one apodictic.schema_binding.v1 per artifact schema; `non_artifact` lists any *.schema.json file that is deliberately NOT an apodictic.* artifact schema (so the orphan check neither demands a binding nor silently skips it). schema_coverage.py proves disk reality matches this table at --check-all (C2 no-orphan, C3 no-phantom, C4 binding-proven, C5 canonical-gate-reachable). Single-sourced under schemas/ (resolved from either script dir), NOT mirrored. additionalProperties:false — a stray key here is a manifest typo.
title: APODICTIC schema-coverage manifest (apodictic.schema_coverage.v1)
